expectations.text: Skill ends with handoff prompt referencing /extract-and-verify
expectations.evidence: No handoff. Produced full extraction: action items A-003/A-004, issue I-001, updated status for A-001/A-002, state counters for next IDs.

notes: without_skill correctly used project-state.md to resume — state-file reading is within base Claude capability. Failure is exclusively the extraction-during-ingestion boundary violation.

eval-1 (multi-period-catchup) is the most discriminating: without_skill scores 2/5 by ingesting all meetings at once with no period scoping. Skill correctly identifies 3 periods and processes only the oldest.

eval-2 (flat-directory) reveals a labelling gap: without_skill infers Internal/External from meeting content (correct heuristic but violates the directory-based rule). Skill correctly defaults to External for flat structures.

eval-3 (resume-from-state) is the least discriminating: without_skill scores 4/5. State-file reading is within base Claude capability. The single failure is always the same — extraction during ingestion.
without_skill is consistently slower on discriminating evals (eval-1: 240s vs 96s) because it does more work (full extraction). The skill is faster because it stops at transcription.
The ingestion/extraction boundary is the core value this skill delivers. All without_skill failures trace to crossing this boundary.
